zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Corbet於大約1173年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛時，他的父親Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley20歲，母親Cecily Hadley0歲。他於大約1201年與Joanna de Toret在英國英格蘭史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1235年之前在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Corbet于大约1173年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛时，他的父亲Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley20岁，母亲Cecily Hadley0岁。他于大约1201年与Joanna de Toret在英国英格兰史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1235年之前在英国英格兰史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Corbet was born about 1173, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley, was 20 and his mother, Cecily Hadley, was 0. He married Joanna de Toret about 1201, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1235, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Corbet est né environ 1173, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Cecily Hadley, avait 0 ans. Il a épousé Joanna de Toret environ 1201, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1235, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Corbet um 1173 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley 20 und seine Mutter Cecily Hadley 0. Er hat um 1201 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Joanna de Toret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1235 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Corbet è nato il circa 1173 nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Hadley, aveva 0 anni. Lui sposato Joanna de Toret circa 1201, nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1235, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Corbet(이)가 대략 1173년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Hadley(은)는 0세였다. 그는 대략 1201년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루에서 Joanna de Toret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1235년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Corbet родился около 1173 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Corbet ,Lord of Tasley было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Hadley, 0. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna de Toret около 1201 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1235 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
